rules.rule_text:
rule TriorisSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Adware.Trioris.vb"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$ = "instamarket.js" ascii wide
		$ = "instamarketoff.js" ascii wide
		$ = "trioris.net" ascii wide
		$ = "storegid.com" ascii wide
		$ = "screentoolkit.com" ascii wide
		$ = "Sergey Cherezov" ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
